rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs' Interrogatories From Defendant The H.B. Smith Company, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 19, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiff¿s interrogatories from defendant H.B. Smith Co., Inc. is continued per defendant¿s request to September 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 to allow the parties to further meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm on September 19, 2011 the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain unresolved and then appear at the hearing at 9am on September 20. = (220/HEK)
